violations.issue: createdData object defined but never populated - creates confusion about test data lifecycle
violations.recommendation: Either populate createdData with seeded equipment IDs or remove the unused tracking object

violations.issue: Request listener pattern for tracking API calls - could be race-prone if not properly awaited
violations.recommendation: Consider using page.route() to intercept and count requests more deterministically

strengths: No hard waits detected - all use waitForResponse() for deterministic timing
No if/else control flow in test bodies - all tests execute same path every time
No try/catch blocks for flow control - failures bubble up clearly
Network-first pattern applied correctly in all E2E tests
summary: Excellent determinism with minor improvements needed around data tracking and request interception patterns
